name: MARZETTI CO
summary: The Marzetti Company (formerly Lancaster Colony Corporation) is an Ohio-based manufacturer and marketer of specialty food products for retail and foodservice channels. Products include frozen breads (New York Bakery, Sister Schubert's), refrigerated and shelf-stable salad dressings and dips (Marzetti, Cardini's, Girard's), croutons, and frozen pasta. The company also produces licensed branded products for Chick-fil-A, Olive Garden, Buffalo Wild Wings, Texas Roadhouse, and Subway, operating 14 food plants across the United States.

products.name: New York Bakery Frozen Garlic Breads
products.description: Frozen garlic bread products sold in retail and foodservice channels under the New York Bakery brand.

products.name: Sister Schubert's Frozen Rolls
products.description: Frozen Parkerhouse style yeast rolls and dinner rolls sold in retail and foodservice channels.

products.name: Marzetti Salad Dressings and Dips
products.description: Refrigerated and shelf-stable salad dressings, vegetable dips, and fruit dips under the Marzetti brand.

products.name: Cardini's and Girard's Dressings
products.description: Shelf-stable salad dressings sold in retail channels under Cardini's and Girard's brand names.

products.name: Chatham Village Croutons
products.description: Croutons and salad toppings sold under the Chatham Village and New York Bakery brand names.

products.name: Marzetti Frozen Pasta
products.description: Frozen pasta products sold in the foodservice segment under the Marzetti brand.

products.name: Licensed Sauces and Dressings
products.description: Branded sauces and dressings produced under license for Chick-fil-A, Olive Garden, Buffalo Wild Wings, Texas Roadhouse, and Subway.

partnerships.description: Exclusive license to manufacture and sell Chick-fil-A sauces and dressings in retail channel; also supplies Chick-fil-A foodservice needs.
License agreement to manufacture and sell Olive Garden branded dressings for retail.
License agreement to manufacture and sell Buffalo Wild Wings branded sauces for retail.
License agreement to manufacture and sell Texas Roadhouse branded steak sauces and frozen rolls for retail.
License agreement to manufacture and sell Subway branded sauces for retail.
